---
title: "Louisa Leslie, Countess of Rothes"
---

## Louisa Leslie, Countess of Rothes

**Dates:** (d. 21 Jan 1886)

**Maiden name:** (Anderson Morshead)

### Description

sister of the Rev. John Philip Anderson Morshead

### Biography

She married  (7 May 1831) the 15th Earl of Rothes. [LG]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
